<div class="post-split">
<p>Body text on the left, in the prose column. Text keeps its normal left alignment; the figure bumps out into the right margin. Source order matters: text first, figure second.</p>
<figure>
<img src="/assets/blog/{{date:YYYY/MM}}/CHART.png" alt="describe the chart">
<figcaption>The chart spills into the right margin.</figcaption>
</figure>
</div>
